prompt: Create a production-ready 2D pixel-art character sprite sheet on one perfectly flat, uniform chroma-key magenta background (#FF00FF), with absolutely no texture, shadow, glow or variation in the background. Exact grid: 4 equal columns by 3 equal rows, 12 full-body sprites total, no borders, no labels, no grid lines. Every sprite shows EXACTLY the same elegant young lamplighter, side view facing right, same scale, same costume, same facial features and same ground baseline. Character: a beautiful East Asian youth around 18 to 20 years old, slender and upright, luminous gentle eyes, youthful clean face with no beard, slightly tousled short black hair, no hat, quiet and poetic presence. He wears a refined timeless outfit for a fictional old city: clean ivory high-collar shirt, fitted midnight-blue waistcoat, tailored deep-navy knee-length coat with a short cape-like shoulder layer, slim charcoal trousers, polished dark brown leather ankle boots, one restrained rust-red scarf accent, and a warm brass hand lantern. Clothing is elegant, clean, well-tailored and visually pleasing. Absolutely NO patches, NO torn fabric, NO cloth shoes, NO work cap, NO Chinese revolutionary uniform, NO Mao suit, NO military look, NO peasant clothing and NO hardship imagery. Not cute, not chibi, elegant natural proportions around 6.5 heads tall. Row 1: restrained idle breathing cycle, four subtle poses. Row 2: readable walking cycle, four key poses with light youthful movement. Row 3: walking while carefully carrying the lit lantern, four key poses; lantern remains in the same hand and emits only a compact warm glow. Style: sophisticated literary narrative pixel art, romantic storybook atmosphere, art-nouveau-inspired silhouette, hard-edged pixel clusters, limited palette of midnight blue, charcoal, ivory, muted rust red and warm amber. No anti-aliasing, no soft blur, no gradients, no 3D, no extra props, no duplicated limbs, no cast shadow, no scenery. Leave generous magenta padding around every cell.
